_comment: Verified roster (handles cross-checked by research, 2026-07-13). HYPOTHESES, not endorsements — the grader measures each one's real edge vs the Kalshi line. Only X-handle sources are harvestable today; top YouTube/podcast sources are listed in _youtube_todo for a later transcript-based pass. domain: mma|boxing.
_youtube_todo: Best insider-with-cadence sources are podcast/YT (need transcripts): Show Me The Money (@showmethemoneypod, Gilbert Burns/Moicano), Weekly Scraps (Aljamain @FunkMasterUFC), Henry Cejudo (@HenryCejudoTripleC), The MMA Guru (@the-mma-guru), MMA Vivisection, Firas Zahabi (@CoachZahabi), Teddy Atlas podcast. Grade via captions/AssemblyAI later.

sources.name: VictorMMA
sources.note: Titles are 'X vs Y Will Not Be Close' - no prediction keywords, so needs wideNet. Marquee fights only, ~1-2/month: high conviction, LOW volume, will take a long time to reach a judgeable sample.

sources.note: Full-card picks & predictions per card. Discovery pass 2, yield 17/45, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Santino DeFranco
sources.note: Ex-UFC/WEC fighter; per-card MMA breakdown with predictions + best bets. Clean insider test. Discovery pass 2, yield 17/17, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Chronic Combat Conversations
sources.note: Best bets + full-card predictions per card (very high density). Discovery pass 2, yield 15/16, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Dribbl Sport
sources.note: Full-card betting preview + predictions per card. Discovery pass 2, yield 14/45, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Winning In The Shadows
sources.note: 'Every fight breakdown' + best bets per card. Discovery pass 2, yield 12/45, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: The Fight Site Presents
sources.note: Respected analytical outlet; full-card breakdown, analysis & predictions. Discovery pass 2, yield 6/27, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: The Octagon Oracle
sources.note: Full-card 'deepest analysis' breakdowns of UPCOMING cards; educational framing, not self-labeled as predictions (VictorMMA archetype -> wideNet). Edu-discovery 16/17, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: The MMA Analysis
sources.note: Per-card previews ('UFC 328 Chimaev vs Strickland Preview'); analytical, not prediction-labeled. Edu-discovery 9/9, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: The Fighting Business
sources.note: 'A DEEPER DIVE' analytical previews of upcoming main events; educational, not prediction-labeled. Edu-discovery 5/12, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Behind the Lines News
sources.note: Matchup system analysis ("Khamzat's system vs Strickland's counter"); forward-looking educational, not prediction-labeled. Edu-discovery 8/28, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Unleashed MMA
sources.note: Declarative pre-fight takes ('the only way Strickland beats Khamzat'); implicit predictions, not labeled. Edu-discovery 6/40, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Morning Kombat
sources.note: Reputable show (Luke Thomas + Brian Campbell); card previews with explicit LINE analysis, not always titled 'prediction'. Edu-discovery 5/19, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Tom Aspinall Official
sources.note: UFC heavyweight champion previewing upcoming fights ('Ilia Topuria vs Justin Gaethje preview'); champion insider, not prediction-labeled. Edu-discovery 6/19, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Pound 4 Pound (Kamaru & Henry)
sources.note: Kamaru Usman + Henry Cejudo (two ex-champs) analyzing upcoming fights; high insider signal, question-framed not prediction-labeled. Edu-discovery 10/42, 2026-07-15.

sources.name: Jeff Mayweather
sources.note: Trainer with an actual Fight Predictions playlist. Research found trainers almost never run pick channels - most only appear as guests elsewhere - so he is a rare clean insider test.

sources.name: Inside Boxing (Algieri)
sources.note: Chris Algieri (ex-WBO champ). TWICE WEEKLY, explicit FULL-CARD picks. Best boxing source found: an ex-champ picking whole cards he has no stake in = the clean insider test.

sources.name: Paulie Malignaggi
sources.note: 2-div champ. Weekly Combat & Coffee. NOTE: @paulie.tv is his INSTAGRAM, not YouTube - that guess would have been a dead handle.

sources.name: Lawrence Osueke
sources.note: ACTIVE pro boxer running a breakdown/prediction channel. Exactly the Arman archetype.

sources.name: DAZN Boxing (Mannix & Mora)
sources.note: Sergio Mora (ex-champ) + Mannix; weekly picks

sources.name: Fighters Corner
sources.note: Aggregates PRO FIGHTERS predictions - a vein of insider picks in one place

sources.name: Chris Mannix (YT)
sources.note: Preview/picks per card

sources.name: PBC Podcast
sources.note: Journalist-hosted, but does COMPLETE FULL-CARD predictions weekly. High pick density = reaches a judgeable sample fast. Verify it is still running.

sources.name: Carl Froch
sources.note: 4x super-middleweight world champ. Headline picks, multiple uploads/week.

sources.name: Tony Bellew (Fight Your Corner)
sources.note: Ex-WBC cruiserweight champ. Weekly, sponsored by a betting app so predictions are structurally central.

sources.name: Johnny Nelson (That Boxing Show)
sources.note: Ex-WBO cruiserweight champ (13 defences). Weekly, billed on bold predictions.

_removed_2026_07_13: Dropped as YouTube sources after verification — their channels resolve fine but publish NO prediction videos, so they yield nothing: Firas Zahabi (@CoachZahabi, technique only), FightCourt/Din Thomas (@FightCourt, news/commentary), Gareth A Davies (@GarethADaviesGG, interviews), Dan Tom (@DanTomMMA, YT dormant since May). NOTE: Dan Tom is the only TRUSTED source (+56% ROI) but his picks live behind a Substack paywall, so only his TWEETS are gradeable (he remains in the roster as an X source). Do not re-add these as YouTube sources without checking they actually post prediction videos.
